section.heading: Contract and grant authority

content.p: The Director may, by contract or grant, provide for any public or private organization to carry out the National Civilian Community Corps program.

paragraph.heading: Federal and National Guard property
paragraph.chapeau: The Director shall enter into agreements, as necessary, with the Secretary of Defense, the Governor of a State, territory or commonwealth, or the commanding general of the District of Columbia National Guard, as the case may be, to utilize—

subparagraph.content: equipment of the Department of Defense and equipment of the National Guard; and
Department of Defense facilities and National Guard facilities identified pursuant to section 12622(c) of this title.

content.p: The Director may enter into contracts or agreements for the use of other equipment or facilities to the extent practicable to train and house members of the National Civilian Community Corps and leaders of Corps units.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 101–610, title I, § 161, formerly § 195J, as added Pub. L. 102–484, div. A, title X, § 1092(a)(1), Oct. 23, 1992, 106 Stat. 2530; renumbered § 161 and amended Pub. L. 103–82, title I, § 104(b), (e)(2)(F), Sept. 21, 1993, 107 Stat. 840, 847; Pub. L. 111–13, title I, § 1511, Apr. 21, 2009, 123 Stat. 1526.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 12653j of this title prior to renumbering by Pub. L. 103–82, § 104(b).

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 12621, Pub. L. 101–610, title I, § 165, Nov. 16, 1990, 104 Stat. 3159, related to rural youth service demonstration project, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 103–82, § 104(a).
A prior section 161 of Pub. L. 101–610 was classified to section 12612 of this title prior to repeal by Pub. L. 103–82.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2009—Subsec. (a). Pub. L. 111–13, § 1511(1), substituted “carry out the National Civilian Community Corps program” for “perform any program function under this division”.
Subsec. (b)(2). Pub. L. 111–13, § 1511(2)(B), inserted “National” before “Civilian Community Corps”.

note.heading: Effective Date of 2009 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 111–13 effective Oct. 1, 2009, see section 6101(a) of Pub. L. 111–13, set out as a note under section 4950 of this title.

note.heading: Effective Date of 1993 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 103–82 effective Oct. 1, 1993, see section 123 of Pub. L. 103–82, set out as a note under section 1701 of Title 16, Conservation.
